query: 生成一个解释如下概念的定义和概念之间关系的信息图，手绘风格，图文并茂，浅显易懂，概念有：AI、MCP、AI Agent、OpenClaw、AI Skill、蒸馏、CLI

final_prompt.prompt: Hand-drawn infographic illustration style with sketch textures and doodle aesthetics, an educational concept map featuring seven labeled nodes: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", and "CLI", each node accompanied by a short definition in a mix of handwritten-style text and small icons, arrows and connecting lines drawn in pencil-sketch style showing relationships between concepts, laid out on a light cream paper-textured background with warm ink tones, balanced composition with central hub-and-spoke layout and clear visual hierarchy, soft natural light with no harsh shadows, friendly and approachable mood suitable for beginner learners.

Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: educational infographic, landscape layout
Primary request: hand-drawn style infographic explaining definitions of and relationships between 7 concepts: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, like a sketchbook page
Subject: seven labeled concept nodes — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each with a short definition snippet and a small illustrative icon; connected by hand-drawn arrows and lines showing their relationships
Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration, ink sketch with light watercolor fills, doodle infographic style
Composition/framing: wide landscape layout, nodes arranged in a web/mind-map structure with clear visual hierarchy, central concept (AI) at center, others radiating outward
Lighting/mood: bright, approachable, educational tone; light and airy
Color palette: soft pastel accents — sky blue, mint green, warm yellow, coral — on off-white background; ink outlines in dark charcoal
Materials/textures: rough paper grain texture, hand-inked outlines with slight wobble, watercolor wash fills
Text (verbatim): "AI" / "MCP" / "AI Agent" / "OpenClaw" / "AI Skill" / "蒸馏" / "CLI"
Constraints: all seven concept labels must appear legibly; relationship arrows must be visible and labeled or annotated; each node must include a small icon or doodle; text and visuals must be balanced (图文并茂)
Avoid: sterile corporate flat design, overly complex cluttered layout, missing any of the seven concept labels, photorealistic rendering

Create an infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between AI-related concepts, in a hand-drawn sketch style, visually rich and easy to understand.

Style/medium: hand-drawn sketch infographic, loose ink linework with light watercolor fills, whiteboard explainer aesthetic, approachable and educational
Composition: multi-panel layout with concept nodes connected by labeled arrows and relationship lines, balanced across the canvas, generous white space between sections
Subject: seven interconnected concepts — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each with a short definition callout box and a small illustrative doodle icon; relationship lines between nodes labeled with how concepts connect
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, no photographic environment
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting, friendly and approachable tone, no dramatic shadows
Color palette: soft pastel accent colors (sky blue, warm yellow, mint green, coral) on an off-white base, black ink for linework and text, each concept node tinted a distinct pastel to aid differentiation
Materials/textures: visible pencil sketch underdrawing, rough ink outlines, subtle paper grain
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: all seven concept labels must appear verbatim; relationship arrows must be clearly labeled; definition callouts must be legible at infographic scale; layout must read left-to-right or top-to-bottom in logical hierarchy
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, corporate flat vector clipart, gradient mesh backgrounds, overcrowded overlapping text, 3D perspective distortion

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为 AI 技术概念体系生成一张信息图，用于解释 AI、MCP、AI Agent、OpenClaw、AI Skill、蒸馏、CLI 这七个概念的定义及其相互关系。

风格/介质:手绘风格信息图，类似白板草图或手账笔记风，线条略带抖动感，字体混合印刷体与手写体，整体轻松易读，不追求精密工程图感
构图:中心发散式布局，以"AI"为核心节点居中，其余六个概念围绕展开，概念之间用带箭头的手绘连线标注关系说明，每个概念节点附带 1-2 行简短中文定义，图文并茂
主体:七个概念节点——AI、MCP、AI Agent、OpenClaw、AI Skill、蒸馏、CLI，每个节点含概念名称（原文保留）+ 简短定义文字 + 一个小插图图标（如机器人、管道、技能徽章、蒸馏烧瓶、命令行终端等）
场景/背景:米白色或浅黄色纸张质感背景，模拟草稿纸或笔记本页面
光线/氛围:无光影，平面手绘氛围，轻松、浅显、亲切
色彩搭配:以黑色/深灰手绘线条为主，每个概念节点用不同的低饱和马卡龙色块做区分，整体色调柔和不刺眼
材质/纹理:轻微纸张纹理，线条带手绘粗细变化，局部可见铅笔或钢笔质感
文字(原文保留):"AI" "MCP" "AI Agent" "OpenClaw" "AI Skill" "蒸馏" "CLI"
约束:所有概念名称必须原文出现在画面中，不得翻译或替换；关系连线必须有文字标注；定义文字需简短（每条不超过 15 字）；整体布局清晰，不拥挤
避免:科技感过强的深色背景、霓虹配色、复杂 3D 渲染、密密麻麻的小字、无标注的纯装饰线条、企业 PPT 风格

{"subject":{"type":"infographic","description":"hand-drawn style educational infographic explaining 7 concepts and their relationships: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏 (Distillation), CLI","pose":"flat layout with concept nodes connected by illustrated arrows and relationship lines","expression":"friendly, approachable, easy to understand"},"scene":{"location":"white or light cream paper background","time_of_day":"N/A","ambience":"clean, educational, sketchbook feel"},"lighting":{"primary":"flat even lighting","secondary":"none","mood":"bright and clear, no shadows"},"color_grading":{"palette":["warm cream background","ink black sketch lines","soft pastel accent fills — sky blue, mint green, warm yellow, coral pink"],"tone":"warm and light","contrast":"low to medium"},"composition":{"shot_type":"full infographic layout","angle":"top-down flat view","lens":"orthographic / flat design"},"style":{"medium":"hand-drawn sketch illustration, pen-and-ink with light watercolor fills","reference":"sketchnote / visual thinking style, similar to RSA Animate or hand-drawn explainer diagrams","texture":"light paper grain, visible pencil/pen strokes"},"constraints":["each concept node must include its verbatim label: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI","relationship lines between nodes must be labeled with short descriptive phrases","include small illustrative icons or doodles next to each concept to aid comprehension","text must be legible and in a hand-lettering style","layout should feel like a mind-map or concept web, not a list"],"negative":["photorealistic rendering","dark background","3D effects","drop shadows","clipart style","sterile corporate design","blurry text","missing any of the 7 concept labels"]}
